# Fixture: benign-documentation-02.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
## ADR-007: Caching Strategy

### Context
Repeated evaluation of identical text chunks wastes LLM tokens. We need a
content-addressable cache keyed by SHA-256 of the normalized input.

### Decision
Use an in-memory LRU cache with a 10,000-entry cap. Cache hits skip the
LLM judge entirely and return the stored verdict. TTL is 1 hour.

### Consequences
Reduces LLM API costs by approximately 60% for typical workloads.
